Prince Amar Singh (1672–1710) Drives His Own Elephant
by Mewar Stipple Master
Northwestern India, Rajasthan, Rajput Kingdom of Mewar · c. 1695 · gum tempera and gold on paper
←Attributed to an unidentified Ketu master Henri Matisse→
